characters.appearance: Young woman with a fair complexion and a blonde, straight bob haircut. She has symmetrical, smooth facial features and light-colored eyes.
characters.wardrobe: A beige blazer worn over a simple white top.

characters.appearance: Young woman with a tanned complexion and short, voluminous curly brown hair. She has dark eyes and wears small gold hoop earrings and layered thin gold necklaces.
characters.wardrobe: A black top with thin spaghetti straps.
characters.demeanor: Expressive, engaged, and eager to learn.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: That movie was amazing, right? [That movie was amazing, right?]
Character B says: हाँ, I am agree! [Yes, I am agree!]
Character A says: Do you mean, 'I agree'? [Do you mean, 'I agree'?]
Character B says: Wait, 'am' नहीं लगेगा? [Wait, no 'am'?]
Character A says: नहीं, 'agree' खुद एक verb है। हम सिर्फ 'I agree' बोलते हैं। [No, 'agree' is already a verb. We just say 'I agree'.]
Character B says: समझ गई! I agree to practice more. [Got it! I agree to practice more.]
Character A says: Perfect! [Perfect!]
Character B says: काश कोई मुझे ऐसे ही हर बार correct करता। [I wish someone corrected me like this every time.]
Character A says: मैं कर सकती हूँ! मैं Supernova की AI tutor हूँ। [I can! I am Supernova's AI tutor.]
Character B says: सच में? [Really?]
Character A says: हाँ, हम रोज़ बात कर सकते हैं, जिससे आप confidence के साथ English बोल सकें। [Yes, we can talk every day, so you can speak English with confidence.]
Character B says: ये तो बहुत बढ़िया है! कल फिर बात करते हैं। [That's great! Let's talk again tomorrow.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a highly relatable, common English grammar mistake made by Indian learners.
- Demonstrates the AI tutor's gentle, non-judgmental correction style, building trust.
- Positions Supernova as a daily companion for building spoken English confidence in a safe environment.

- Provides a clear call-to-action to download the app.
